values.item.space-suit.title: Spacesuit
values.item.space-suit.description: A sealed utility suit with an integral air system.
values.item.air-canister.title: Air Canister
values.item.air-canister.description: A compact replacement canister for the suit recycler.
values.item.water-pouch.title: Water Pouch
values.item.water-pouch.description: A small sealed pouch of drinking water.
values.item.food-ration.title: Food Ration
values.item.food-ration.description: A dense emergency ration in foil packaging.
values.action.open-emergency-locker.title: Open the Emergency Locker
values.action.open-emergency-locker.description: Force open the marked locker beside the airlock.
values.action.open-emergency-locker.success: The warped door yields. A folded spacesuit hangs inside beside two air canisters, one water pouch, and a single foil ration.
values.action.open-emergency-locker.failure: The locker door flexes against its bent frame but does not release.
values.action.inspect-cryobay-airlock.title: Inspect the Airlock
values.action.inspect-cryobay-airlock.descripti: Check the only intact exit and its pressure controls.
values.action.inspect-cryobay-airlock.success: The inner door still seals. Its panel shows vacuum beyond and warns that opening it will vent the cryobay through damaged equalization valves.
values.action.inspect-cryobay-airlock.failure: The pressure display flickers between unreadable values. The inner door remains locked in its frame.
values.action.watch-the-stars.title: Watch the Stars
values.action.watch-the-stars.description: Study the strip of star field visible through the fractured outer wall.
values.action.watch-the-stars.success: The stars drift with the vessel, stop, then retrace several seconds of motion before continuing. Loose frost on the glass does not move with them.
values.action.watch-the-stars.failure: Reflections from the failing status lights cross the glass. The stars remain difficult to track.
values.action.check-cryobay-console.title: Check the Cryobay Console
values.action.check-cryobay-console.description: Wake the room console and review the remaining ship systems.
values.action.check-cryobay-console.success: Most compartments return no signal. A main intersection and the captain's deck still answer, but the route begins beyond the airlock.
values.action.check-cryobay-console.failure: The console wakes to a field of dead compartment indicators, then loses power.

privateNotes: The cryobay now offers finite survival supplies, a dangerous exit to assess, the first temporal observation, and a concrete route deeper into the vessel.
